meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Speed Up Freelance Development (Beginner Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop slow development speed. Learn how to use Git with AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to ship freelance projects faster and with higher quality.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate AI-driven version control. By utilizing Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative commit generation, you can automate repetitive coding tasks, maintain clean Git history, and accelerate your feature delivery speed by up to 300% without sacrificing code quality.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client's deadline, yet you're stuck in a loop of boilerplate code and manual Git commits. Every minute spent toggling between your terminal and a documentation tab is a minute stolen from your bottom line. The friction of 'slow development' isn't just an annoyance; it’s a direct threat to your freelance scalability.

But what if your codebase could build itself? By merging the precision of Git versioning with the cognitive power of AI, you transform from a manual laborer into a high-leverage architect. This guide bridges the gap between frustration and flow, showing you how to command AI to handle the grunt work while you focus on high-value logic.

steps.title: Contextualize the Repository
steps.description: Initialize your project context so the AI understands your stack and coding style before writing a single line.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project structure and existing patterns. Document the current architectural constraints and propose a standardized folder structure for a modular SaaS application.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate boilerplate code that follows your project's specific conventions to ensure consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a new feature module for user authentication using the existing project patterns. Include input validation and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate auth module with validation'

steps.title: Intelligent Commit Messages
steps.description: Automate your Git history by having AI summarize your changes into professional, conventional commits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last set of changes and draft a conventional commit message that highlights the business logic added.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring Cycles
steps.description: Trigger a refactor of legacy code blocks to improve readability and performance before pushing to main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this component for better performance and readability, ensuring it strictly follows the existing dependency injection pattern.

steps.title: Automated Pull Request Documentation
steps.description: Generate comprehensive PR descriptions that explain the 'why' behind the code for your clients or team members.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a detailed pull request summary explaining the functional changes, the impact on performance, and potential edge cases tested.

pro_tips: Always define a 'persona' for your AI agent in your config file to ensure it writes code matching your specific architectural style.
Use AI to generate unit tests *before* you write the implementation; it forces the AI to understand the edge cases first.
Keep your Git history clean by squashing AI-generated commits that fix minor linting issues before merging to main.
Use the AI's 'explain' feature on your own code periodically to identify hidden technical debt you might have missed.
Create a custom 'project-rules.md' file that both Antigravity and Claude Code can reference to avoid repetitive configuration prompts.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once you have mastered these workflows, begin building a custom library of 'Prompt Templates' specific to your most common freelance project types to reduce setup time to under five minutes.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building the future of your freelance business. With these AI workflows, you are no longer just coding—you are engineering success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
